approval_statement: I, edithatogo, approve bounded pilot attachment-derivation execution request SHA-256 ad2ac19a3be836165948585304a9050b95f4612dd514cb3bb826d21d2ab38f2f as committed in 4f3e834a470eedabbf3cd8dbeafa2801147ed9c9. I authorize creation of the final executable authorization and one local, all-or-nothing, two-pass text derivation of the three exact request 11872 PDF attachments pinned by that request, using source root /private/tmp/fyi-attachment-snapshot-11872-approved and output directory /private/tmp/foio-bounded-pilot-11872-derived. Execution is permitted only after the final authorization is committed and its exact clean-HEAD pre-execution verifier passes. This approval authorizes local PDF processing and derived-content creation only for that bounded derivation. It does not authorize context presentation, analyst execution, reconciliation, empirical claims, population inference, archive-wide claims, human-reviewed claims, gold promotion, legal certification, redistribution, publication, training, fine-tuning, release, dataset publication, or paper updates.
